_comment: Alignment config — maps IFC building geometry to the spolia wall levels.
_usage: Update these values when uploading a new IFC/GLB. Measurements in mm.

north_facade._comment: Z position of the north facade outer surface in IFC coordinates. The wall face sits here; building extends behind (+Z).

building_transform._comment: Additional transform applied to the IFC model after alignment. Use for fine-tuning.
